creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Update cyberchef 9.15.1 to 9.18.0
Changelog

New:
Convert to NATO alphabet
'Generate Image' operation added
'Colossus' operation added
More Extractors: LZOP, DMP, PF, PFWin10, LNK

Bugfix:
Tidied up 'Generate Image' operation
Replaced 'new Date().getTime()' calls with 'Date.now()' for clarity and performance
Tidied up JAR and DEB extractors
